title: Backrooms
notes: Official A24 film listing identifying Kane Parsons as director and Will Soodik as writer.

title: Backrooms (2026) — title summary
notes: Dynamic title page. The cumulative total must always be quoted with an access date because it changes during the theatrical run.

title: Toy Story 5 box-office weekend report
notes: Reported Backrooms at approximately $301 million worldwide on June 21 and identified it as A24's first release above $300 million globally.

title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
creator: Eli Collins
notes: Confirms a research partnership intended to develop workflows and techniques with filmmakers. It does not identify Backrooms or any other specific production.

title: Google DeepMind signs AI research deal with film studio A24
creator: Anhata Rooprai and Dawn Chmielewski
notes: Confirms the partnership and attributes the approximately $75 million figure to The Wall Street Journal; DeepMind did not confirm the amount to Reuters.

title: Google Investing in ‘Backrooms’ Studio A24 as Part of New AI Research Partnership
creator: Ben Fritz
notes: Reports that Google is investing around $75 million in A24 and that the companies intend to develop tools for film production and distribution.

title: ‘Backrooms’: Here’s The Current State Of A Sequel For Kane Parsons
notes: Reports a sequel in early development and says Parsons was seeking a screenwriting collaborator. This is not a release commitment or production-start confirmation.

title: Post describing Kane Parsons' exploratory interest in a Portal film
creator: Kyle Buchanan
notes: Buchanan says he asked Parsons in early May about directing Portal and reports Parsons was already looking into it with caution and curiosity. This establishes exploratory interest, not a commissioned project.

title: Backrooms director Kane Parsons has visited Valve, and the chances of a Portal movie happening just shot up
creator: Fay Watson
notes: Documents Instagram Story images from Valve headquarters. Neither the purpose of the visit nor a Portal production was confirmed.

title: Backrooms: Everything Must Go Edition w/ Extra Footage
notes: Lists a July 3, 2026 opening, a 126-minute runtime, and 15 minutes of new theatrically exclusive post-credit footage.

title: Japanese Backrooms Trailer and Release Date
notes: Reports a September 4 Japanese release based on A24 Japan and Happinet Phantom Studios social announcements. The canonical distributor post still needs capture.

title: ‘Backrooms’ Director Kane Parsons Calls AI ‘Genuinely Harmful’ To Creativity
notes: Reports Parsons' criticism of generative AI in creative work from an interview with The Australian.

title: A24’s Bad Excuse For Its Controversial Google AI Partnership Isn’t Impressing Fans
creator: Lewis Parker
notes: Reports a statement from Parsons' official Discord saying he was making clear that the partnership's resources were not to be spent on Backrooms. The original Discord context should be archived before promotion to primary evidence.

title: Kane Pixels — official YouTube channel and playlists
creator: Kane Parsons
notes: Primary index for uploads. Playlist presence is not used to infer whether a series is actively in production, paused, or cancelled.
